attributes.mlflow.spanInputs:
{"context": null, "model_input": {"text": "PROFESSIONAL SERVICES AGREEMENT

Contract Reference: PSA-2024-00892
Effective Date: March 10, 2024

This Professional Services Agreement ("Agreement") is entered into as of the Effective Date by and between:

PARTY A (Service Provider):
XYZ Technology Solutions Private Limited
Registered Address: 456 Innovation Park, Suite 200, San Francisco, CA 94105
Tax Identification Number: 82-1234567
Represented by: Mr. Rajesh Kumar, Chief Executive Officer

AND

PARTY B (Client):
ABC Retail Corporation
Registered Address: 789 Commerce Boulevard, Floor 15, Chicago, IL 60601
Tax Identification Number: 36-7654321
Represented by: Ms. Emily Johnson, Vice President of Operations

RECITALS:
WHEREAS, the Service Provider possesses expertise in enterprise software development, cloud infrastructure, and data analytics; and
WHEREAS, the Client desires to engage the Service Provider to design, develop, and deploy a custom inventory management system;

NOW, THEREFORE, in consideration of the mutual covenants and agreements herein contained, the parties agree as follows:

1. SCOPE OF SERVICES
   1.1 The Service Provider shall design, develop, test, and deploy a cloud-based inventory management platform ("the System") as detailed in Exhibit A.
   1.2 The project shall be executed in three phases: Discovery (4 weeks), Development (16 weeks), and Deployment (4 weeks).
   1.3 The Service Provider shall assign a dedicated project team of no fewer than 8 professionals.

2. COMPENSATION AND PAYMENT TERMS
   2.1 The Client shall pay the Service Provider a total fixed fee of USD 450,000 (Four Hundred Fifty Thousand US Dollars).
   2.2 Payment Schedule:
       (a) 20% upon execution of this Agreement: USD 90,000
       (b) 30% upon completion of Phase 1 (Discovery): USD 135,000
       (c) 30% upon completion of Phase 2 (Development): USD 135,000
       (d) 20% upon final acceptance of Phase 3 (Deployment): USD 90,000
   2.3 Invoices shall be payable within thirty (30) days of receipt.
   2.4 Late payments shall accrue interest at a rate of 1.5% per month.

3. INTELLECTUAL PROPERTY
   3.1 All intellectual property created under this Agreement shall be owned by the Client upon full payment.
   3.2 The Service Provider retains the right to use general methodologies and tools developed independently.

4. CONFIDENTIALITY
   4.1 Both parties agree to maintain strict confidentiality of all proprietary information exchanged during the term of this Agreement.
   4.2 This obligation survives termination of the Agreement for a period of five (5) years.

5. TERMINATION
   5.1 Either party may terminate this Agreement with thirty (30) days prior written notice.
   5.2 Upon termination, the Client shall pay for all services rendered up to the termination date.

6. GOVERNING LAW AND JURISDICTION
   6.1 This Agreement shall be governed by the laws of the State of California.
   6.2 Any disputes shall be resolved through binding arbitration in San Francisco, CA under the rules of the American Arbitration Association.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, the parties have executed this Agreement as of the date first written above.

Service Provider: XYZ Technology Solutions Pvt. Ltd.
By: Rajesh Kumar, CEO | Date: March 10, 2024

Client: ABC Retail Corporation
By: Emily Johnson, VP Operations | Date: March 10, 2024
"}}
